contact_form_intro.heading: Use the form when the inquiry matters.
contact_form_intro.copy:
Share your details, your context, and what you are looking to build or join. We reply according to fit and priority.

Your information is never shared. Used only for AREN communication.

ecosystem.heading: The AREN ecosystem in motion
ecosystem.copy: Move deeper into the system through training, community, or uniform.
